profile: Data Consultant with 2+ years of experience delivering data-driven solutions across analytics, data science, and early-stage data engineering. Experienced in building end-to-end ML and analytics systems from data extraction to deployment.

impact: Enhanced clinical trust by transforming 'black-box' predictions into interpretable medical insights, identifying key physiological and psychosocial drivers of patient well-being.
description: Developed a machine learning framework to predict Quality of Life outcomes for breast cancer patients. Integrated SHAP/LIME (XAI) to provide clinicians with transparent, feature-level explanations for each prediction, enabling personalized intervention strategies and data-driven palliative care.
